English: You have been given {0} specialty points by {1}.

This clause allows you to restrict the acceptance of a contract to only those that have a reputation equal to or greater than the defined amount.

There are two kinds of reputation you can specify here: 
 - {0}, which is the sum of all player's ratings, multiplied by a network effect.
 - {1}, which is the sum of the opinions from players you have rated favorably (and who they have rated favorably, etc).

You can review the reputations of all players on the server through the citizen list, which displays players in reputation order, and displays reviews from other players in the reputation tooltip.
SimplifedChinese:
此子句允许你将合同的接受范围限制为声望等于或大于定义金额的合同。

你可以在此处指定两种声望：
-{0}，即所有玩家的评分总和乘以网络效应。
-{1}，即你所评价的玩家（以及他们所评价的玩家等）的意见之和。

你可以查看通过“公民”列表显示服务器上所有玩家的声望，该列表按声望顺序显示玩家，并在声望提示信息中显示其他玩家的评论。

English: Air pollution output is divided by this to determine PPM. It depends on AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 and the world area. For 1km2 and pressure 1kg/m2, 1 ton = 1PPM (part per million), which is the unit that determines climate change effects.

English: How much PPM (particles per million) will be added to/removed from atmosphere per one tone of matter (i.e. CO2).
SimplifedChinese: 每一种音调（例如，二氧化碳）将添加到大气中或从大气中去除多少百万分率（百万分之颗粒）。

English: Atmosphere pressure used in the atmosphere size formula. Trees absorb and pollution from tables produced in tons and converted to PPM by dividing on total atmosphere size. AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2 where WorldAreaInM2 = (Dimensions.x * 10) * (Dimensions.y * 10). In example for 1km² (1000000m²) world with atmosphere pressure 1 kg/m² it will be 1000000 tons, resulting in 1 PPM per 1 ton of pollution or absorb (1 PPM =  1000000 * tons / AtmosphereSizeInTons), increasing pressure to 2 will result in 0.5 PPM per ton.
SimplifedChinese: 大气压公式中使用的大气压。树木吸收并污染了以吨为单位的餐桌，并通过除以大气总大小将其转换为百万分率。 AtmosphereSizeInTons = WorldAreaInM2 * AtmospherePressureKgPerM2，其中WorldAreaInM2 =（Dimensions.x * 10）*（Dimensions.y * 10）。例如，对于大气压力为1 公斤 /m²的1km²（1000000m²）世界，将为1000000吨，即每1吨污染物或吸收量产生1 百万分率（1 百万分率 = 1000000 *吨/ AtmosphereSizeInTons），将压力增加到2将导致每吨0.5 百万分率。

English: How old records can be grouped. It means it will try to process all last X days of records to group them. Usually you want to have this number low (1-2) in order to avoid process already processed records, but you can set high value (by example world age) in order to process at once all records from some old save with disabled grouping.

English: Max count of records that will be proccesed at once hourly. For reference, server with 100 players may reach 1.000.000 records per day. Usually 500.000 (default) should be ok, but you may want to tweak it if you have incredibly big count of records or if you are facing lag while it groups records.

English: Most recent records wont be processed in order to have more exact values for laws like 'Users who in last 1 hour claimed plots ...'. You may want to tweak this value to increase this support.

SimplifedChinese: 显示用于观看和操作玩家头衔的指令。

SimplifedChinese: 显示用于操作世界污染的指令。

SimplifedChinese: 一个向新玩家分配物品的料堆。你可以选择每名新玩家都可获得的一组特定物品。

English: A porcelain bathtub for when you need to get clean or just relax.
SimplifedChinese: 一个陶瓷浴缸，给你洗澡和放松的好地方。

English: The assembly line allows for mass production of mechanical products.
SimplifedChinese: 装配线允许你大批量生产机械产品。

English: An ashlar stone bench. Great for display though maybe not as comfy as a padded couch.
SimplifedChinese: 一把方琢石质长凳。非常适合用于展示，但坐起来，我的评价是：不如沙发。

English: A fancy ashlar stone table that has been adorned with gold.
SimplifedChinese: 一张用金子装饰的方琢石桌。

English: All citizens are survivalists in the world of Eco. How can you save the world if you can't save yourself?
SimplifedChinese: 《生态物语》世界中的所有人都是求生者。一屋不扫，何以扫天下?

English: Metal is an important part of progress and smelting is the first step into a new age. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 金属是一个文明进步的重要组成部分，冶炼乃是进入新时代的第一步。你可以通过制造相关物品升级冶炼技能。

English: Self-improvement increases both the amount of weight citizens can carry and their stomach capacity. It also decreases the calories expended when using hammers and shovels. Experience is gained when leveling up other specialties.
SimplifedChinese: 自我提升会增加公民的负重量和他们的卡路里容量，也可以减少使用锤子和铁锹时消耗的卡路里。在升级其他专业时获得自我提升经验。

English: Pottery is an advancement in masonry and can provide an excellent building material for communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 陶艺是石工的进步，可以为社区提供优质的建筑材料。通过制作相关物品来升级陶艺技能。

English: Paper to carry the written word. Or used to stuff in bookshelves. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 纸不仅能记录文字，也能装订成书籍装饰你的书架。通过学习更多的配方解锁技能等级。

English: While it takes some advanced tools and constructions, harvesting and refining oil can be an important step. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 虽然收集石油和精炼石油是一件很困难的事情，但这是文明进步或不可缺的步骤。通过制作相关物品升级炼油技能。

English: Hitting rocks with a pickaxe can be surprisingly difficult. Levels up by breaking rocks.
SimplifedChinese: 用鹤嘴锄挖石头可能会非常困难。不停挖矿就可以升级采矿技能。

English: Milling various products can create important materials for baking and other uses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 碾磨各种各样的物品，能为烘烤或其他用途提供重要的原材料。通过制作相关物品升级碾磨技能。

English: Mechanics for more advanced creations. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 为更先进的发明创造奠定基础的机械技术。通过制造相关物品升级机械技能。

English: Rocks and mortar can provide a suitable building material alternative to wood. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 岩石和砂浆结合之后可以成为一种比传统的木材更合适的建筑材料。通过制造相关物品升级石工技能。

English: Wood is a useful resource and cutting down trees is a skill anyone can appreciate. Levels up by felling trees and clearing debris.
SimplifedChinese: 要想富，先撸树，砍树人人都喜欢。通过砍树和清理树枝碎屑升级伐木技能。

English: Advanced industrialization to produce larger machines and advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 用来生产更多高科技机器的机器。通过制造相关物品升级工业技能。

English: Hunt animals for skin and meat. Levels up by successfully hunting.
SimplifedChinese: 狩猎动物是为采集它们皮和肉。通过狩猎来升级等级。

English: Glassworkers have improved ability to create glass which can be used as a clear building material or framed in steel to create a more industrial look. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 玻璃工人们提高了他们制造玻璃的能力，现在这种玻璃既能作为一种透明的建筑材料，又能采用钢框，打造更具工业感的外观。通过学习更多的配方解锁技能等级。

English: Gathering covers harvesting materials from both the natural environment and human-created farms. Levels up by gathering plants - farmed or natural.
SimplifedChinese: 从大自然环境或农场中采集和收获材料。可透过采集植物提升等级。

English: Adding additional nutrients to the soil can improve farming yield or, if overdone, ruin it. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 在土壤中添加适量的养分，这样可以提高农业产量。如果量过多，会导致农产物的死亡。通过学习更多的配方解锁技能等级。

English: The art of planting and cultivating flora. Levels up by crafting related recipes and using the hoe.
SimplifedChinese: 植物栽培是一门艺术。熟能生巧。

English: Electronics improves the recipes for many advanced materials needed for advanced technology. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 更高级的材料需要更高级的技术，电子技术改善了这种情况。通过学习相关配方解锁技能等级。

English: Cutting edge cooking works with ingredients that don't quite sound like food but can potentially provide high calorie and nutrition. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 尖端烹饪使用听起来不太像食物的原料，但可能会提供高额的热量和营养。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: The basics of cooking in a more civilized environment give bonuses to a variety of food recipes. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 在更文明的环境中进行基础烹饪，会给予各种食物配方额外加成。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: Allows the construction of advanced wood products for furniture and houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 允许使用高级木制品制作家具和建造房屋。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: Cutting logs into usable crafting and building materials is an important skill for budding communities. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 将原木切割成可用的制作和建筑材料，是使社区萌芽的一项重要技能。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: Advanced techniques for producing food over a campfire with a little less burned and a little more golden brown. Levels up by crafting campfire recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 在篝火上烹饪的高级技巧，更少的烧焦，更多的烤熟。由制作篝火配方升级。

English: Butchery allows for more usable products to be harvested from hunted animals and fish. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 屠宰工作允许从狩猎的动物和鱼类中收获更有用的产品。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: Basic Engineering allows easier construction of roads and gives access to early forms of mechanical power. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 基础工程学允许更方便地建造道路，并可获取早期形式的机械动力。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: An introduction to cooking with an oven. Levels up by crafting related unleavened recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 用烤炉烹饪的入门。制作相关未发酵的配方来提升等级。

English: Advanced smelting aids in the production of steel - a key ingredient in the progress of any group. Levels up by crafting advanced smelting recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 高级冶炼有助于钢铁的生产——任何团体发展的关键原料。制作高级冶炼配方来提升等级。

English: Advanced masonry allows the production of high-quality stone furniture and material for houses. Levels up by crafting related recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 高级石工允许生产高品质的石制家具和房屋材料。制作相关配方来提升等级。

English: Advanced cooking techniques for producing more complex foods. Levels up by crafting advanced cooking recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 高级烹饪技巧，用于生产更复杂的食物。制作高级烹饪配方来提升等级。

SimplifedChinese: 高级烘培主要提升了涉及膨松剂的相关配方。制作高级烘培配方来提升等级。

English: Basic Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Tailoring recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 基础升级可大大提高制作裁缝配方时的效率。

English: Modern Upgrade that greatly increases efficiency when crafting Tailoring recipes.
SimplifedChinese: 现代升级，可大大提高制作裁缝配方时的效率。

SimplifedChinese: 现代升级，可大大提高制作机械配方的效率。

SimplifedChinese: 一种非常有用的石油化工合成材料。

SimplifedChinese: 将旋转动力源的速度和扭矩转换至另一台装置。

SimplifedChinese: 一份精美的沙拉，不咸不淡，味道真是好极了。

SimplifedChinese: 一种出色的肥料，可提供多种营养素，尤其是钾。用了之后小麦亩产一千八。

SimplifedChinese: 一种用于制造汽油，塑料和沥青的化石燃料。它的提取、运输和燃烧都对环境产生影响。

SimplifedChinese: 一个用修路工具压实泥土形成的肮脏表面。对任何轮式车辆都很实用。

SimplifedChinese: 使用锤子来用你刚刚锯好的木材建造一个房子吧！

English: Your GPU's Max Tessellation Level is less than 64. AMD is the only known GPU manufacturer who doesn't follow the standard and reduces this setting to hack performance in their "AMD Radeon Software", setting it to 8 in the default optimized settings. You may experience problems with the Minimap rendering. To fix this, set "Max Tessellation Level" to 64 in the software for Eco (explicitly) and restart the game.
SimplifedChinese: 你的显卡的最大曲面细分级别低于64。AMD是已知唯一的不遵守标准的GPU制造商，并在他们的AMD显卡管理工具的优化设置中，把该设置降低为8来骇入式提升性能。你可能会遇到小地图渲染有关的问题，若要解决该问题，在其对 Eco（指定该程序）的优化设置中，将“Max Tessellation Level（最大曲面细分级别）”设置为64，并重启游戏。

This setting defines how plants will be grouped when the world generates. It have two levels of grouping: clusters and groups. A cluster is a large area of the world where a particular type of plant exists, and it affects gameplay by limiting where specific plants can be spawned. Groups are primarily for visual purposes, so plants of the same species grow together with only a small distance between them.

A large, carnivorous canid with a distinctive howl, found in a variety of habitats around the world. They are a keystone species in many ecosystems, and are known for their social behavior and cooperative hunting strategies.

A large bird with distinctive plumage and a fleshy wattle on its neck, which can change color based on its mood. Turkeys are highly social and known for their impressive vocalizations, including the famous gobble.
A large, hairy spider with a distinctive body shape and a venomous bite. Tarantulas are nocturnal and often spend the day hiding in burrows or other sheltered locations.
A freshwater turtle with a distinctive hooked beak and powerful jaws, known for their aggressive behavior and ability to live in a wide range of aquatic habitats.

A highly social rodent that lives in extensive underground burrows, with multiple entrances and tunnels. They use a distinctive bark-like call to communicate with other members of their colony, including to alert them of potential predators.

A playful and agile semi-aquatic mammal, often seen floating on their backs or playing with objects in the water. Otters have a thick, waterproof fur coat that keeps them warm in cold water, and webbed feet that make them excellent swimmers.

A wild goat species with shaggy white fur and curved horns, adapted to live in steep, rocky terrain. Their cloven hooves provide excellent traction and their white coat helps them blend in with their snowy surroundings.

A large wild cat with distinctive black spots and a muscular build, often found in dense rainforests. Jaguars are apex predators and have no natural enemies, although they can be threatened by habitat loss and poaching.
A fast and agile mammal, characterized by its long ears and powerful hind legs. Hares are generally larger and faster than rabbits, and they typically have a more solitary lifestyle.

A small and agile canid with a reddish-orange fur coat and a bushy tail. Foxes are known for their intelligence and problem-solving skills, and have been observed using tools and displaying advanced problem-solving abilities in the wild.

A majestic deer species found in forests and grasslands, characterized by its large antlers and brownish-gray coat. Male elk, also called bulls, grow and shed their antlers annually, which can reach up to 1.2 meters (4 feet) in length.

A graceful, herbivorous mammal with a reddish-brown coat that inhabits forests and fields. Deer have evolved a variety of adaptations to avoid predators, such as their excellent sense of hearing, smell, and vision, as well as their ability to run fast and jump high.

A crustacean with a hard exoskeleton and two large pincers used for defense, feeding, and courtship displays. Crabs are omnivores and feed on a variety of foods, including algae, other invertebrates, and carrion.
A clever and adaptable canid with a bushy tail and distinctive howling and yipping vocalizations. Known for their scavenging and hunting abilities, coyotes can be found in many different habitats.

A massive, shaggy mammal with a large head, humped shoulders, and distinctive curved horns. Often seen grazing on grasslands and prairies, bison are an important example of a species that has made a remarkable comeback from the brink of extinction due to conservation efforts.

These wild ungulates are known for their distinctive curved horns, which are used for dominance battles and display during the mating season. They are well adapted to harsh environments and are found in both mountainous and desert regions.

A large, scaly reptile with a powerful bite and a long tail, commonly found near rivers, swamps, and lakes in warm regions. Alligators are ancient creatures that have remained virtually unchanged for millions of years.
A small brownish rodent with sharp incisors that help them crack open hard seeds and fruits, allowing them to play an important role in seed dispersal.

Determines how fast the game progresses, with 30 days being the normal progression. When set faster, the meteor will hit sooner but you will gain skill faster and crafting will take less time.

When set, citizens will become exhausted after the given number of hours. Trade is very important in Eco.\n
There are two kinds of Currency in Eco: \n\nCitizen Credit (which that citizen can create infinite amounts of) and Backed Currency, which can only be created at a Mint and consumes resources.
Citizens specialize in different skills and need to trade with other specialists to acquire what they need.
The economy viewer will show you all the active trades in the world, as well as Work Parties, Contracts, Rental Offers, Repair Bounties, and more.
Use it to buy and sell both goods and services to other citizens.
An economy can thrive much better if citizens use a common currency, so this is a good goal to work towards as a group.
